speaker: NATHANIEL
text: Very reverend sport, truly, and done in the

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: testimony of a good conscience.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: The deer was, as you know, sanguis, in

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: blood, ripe as the pomewater, who now hangeth

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: like a jewel in the ear of caelo, the sky, the welkin,

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: the heaven, and anon falleth like a crab on the face

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: of terra, the soil, the land, the earth.

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: Truly, Master Holofernes, the epithets are

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: sweetly varied, like a scholar at the least. But, sir, I

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: assure you, it was a buck of the first head.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Sir Nathaniel, haud credo.

speaker: DULL
text: ’Twas not a haud credo, ’twas a pricket.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Most barbarous intimation! Yet a kind of

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: insinuation, as it were, in via, in way, of explication;

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: facere, as it were, replication, or rather, ostentare, to

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: show, as it were, his inclination, after his undressed,

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: unpolished, uneducated, unpruned, untrained, or

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: rather unlettered, or ratherest, unconfirmed fashion,

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: to insert again my haud credo for a deer.

speaker: DULL
text: I said the deer was not a haud credo, ’twas a

speaker: DULL
text: pricket.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Twice-sod simplicity, bis coctus!

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: O thou monster ignorance, how deformed dost thou look!

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: Sir, he hath never fed of the dainties that are bred in a book.

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: He hath not eat paper, as it were; he hath not drunk

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: ink. His intellect is not replenished. He is only an

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: animal, only sensible in the duller parts.

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: And such barren plants are set before us that we thankful should be—

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: Which we of taste and feeling are—for those parts that do fructify in us more than he.

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: For as it would ill become me to be vain, indiscreet, or a fool,

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: So were there a patch set on learning, to see him in a school.

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: But omne bene, say I, being of an old father’s mind:

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: Many can brook the weather that love not the wind.

speaker: DULL
text: You two are bookmen. Can you tell me by your wit

speaker: DULL
text: What was a month old at Cain’s birth that’s not five weeks old as yet?

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Dictynna, goodman Dull, Dictynna,

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: goodman Dull.

speaker: DULL
text: What is “dictima”?

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: A title to Phoebe, to Luna, to the moon.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: The moon was a month old when Adam was no more.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: And raught not to five weeks when he came to fivescore.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Th’ allusion holds in the exchange.

speaker: DULL
text: ’Tis true indeed. The collusion holds in the

speaker: DULL
text: exchange.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: God comfort thy capacity! I say, th’ allusion

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: holds in the exchange.

speaker: DULL
text: And I say the pollution holds in the exchange, for

speaker: DULL
text: the moon is never but a month old. And I say besides

speaker: DULL
text: that, ’twas a pricket that the Princess killed.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Sir Nathaniel, will you hear an extemporal

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: epitaph on the death of the deer? And, to humor

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: the ignorant, call I the deer the Princess killed a

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: pricket.

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: Perge, good Master Holofernes, perge, so it

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: shall please you to abrogate scurrility.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: I will something affect the letter, for it

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: argues facility.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: The preyful princess pierced and pricked a pretty pleasing pricket,

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Some say a sore, but not a sore till now made sore with shooting.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: The dogs did yell. Put “l” to “sore,” then sorel jumps from thicket,

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Or pricket sore, or else sorel. The people fall a-hooting.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: If sore be sore, then “L” to “sore” makes fifty sores o’ sorel.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Of one sore I an hundred make by adding but one more “L.”

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: A rare talent.

speaker: DULL
text: If a talent be a claw, look how he claws

speaker: DULL
text: him with a talent.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: This is a gift that I have, simple, simple—

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: a foolish extravagant spirit, full of forms,

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: figures, shapes, objects, ideas, apprehensions, motions,

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: revolutions. These are begot in the ventricle

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: of memory, nourished in the womb of pia mater,

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: and delivered upon the mellowing of occasion. But

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: the gift is good in those in whom it is acute, and I

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: am thankful for it.

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: Sir, I praise the Lord for you, and so may

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: my parishioners, for their sons are well tutored by

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: you, and their daughters profit very greatly under

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: you. You are a good member of the

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: commonwealth.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Mehercle, if their sons be ingenious,

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: they shall want no instruction; if their daughters be

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: capable, I will put it to them. But Vir sapis qui pauca

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: loquitur. A soul feminine saluteth us.

speaker: JAQUENETTA
text: God give you good morrow,

speaker: JAQUENETTA
text: Master Person.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Master Person, quasi pierce one. And

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: if one should be pierced, which is the one?

speaker: COSTARD
text: Marry, Master Schoolmaster, he that is likeliest

speaker: COSTARD
text: to a hogshead.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Of piercing a hogshead! A good luster

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: of conceit in a turf of earth; fire enough for a flint,

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: pearl enough for a swine. ’Tis pretty, it is well.

speaker: JAQUENETTA
text: Good Master Parson, be so

speaker: JAQUENETTA
text: good as read me this letter. It was given me by

speaker: JAQUENETTA
text: Costard, and sent me from Don Armado. I beseech

speaker: JAQUENETTA
text: you, read it.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Facile precor gelida quando peccas omnia sub umbra.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Ruminat—

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: and so forth. Ah, good old Mantuan! I may speak of

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: thee as the traveler doth of Venice:

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Venetia, Venetia,

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Chi non ti vede, non ti pretia.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Old Mantuan, old Mantuan! Who understandeth

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text:
thee not, loves thee not.
                 
                (
                He
                 
                sings
                .
                )
               Ut, re, sol, la,

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text:
mi, fa. 
                (
                To
                 
                Nathaniel
                .
                )
               Under pardon, sir, what are

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: the contents? Or rather, as Horace says in his—

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text:
(
                Looking
                 
                at
                 
                the
                 
                letter
                .
                )
               What, my soul, verses?

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: Ay, sir, and very learned.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Let me hear a staff, a stanza, a verse,

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Lege, domine.

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: If love make me forsworn, how shall I swear to love?

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: Ah, never faith could hold, if not to beauty vowed!

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: Though to myself forsworn, to thee I’ll faithful prove.

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: Those thoughts to me were oaks, to thee like osiers bowed.

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: Study his bias leaves and makes his book thine eyes,

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: Where all those pleasures live that art would comprehend.

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: If knowledge be the mark, to know thee shall suffice.

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: Well-learnèd is that tongue that well can thee commend.

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: All ignorant that soul that sees thee without wonder;

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: Which is to me some praise that I thy parts admire.

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: Thy eye Jove’s lightning bears, thy voice his dreadful thunder,

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: Which, not to anger bent, is music and sweet fire.

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: Celestial as thou art, O, pardon love this wrong,

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: That sings heaven’s praise with such an earthly tongue.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: You find not the apostrophus, and so

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: miss the accent. Let me supervise the canzonet.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text:
He
                 
                takes
                 
                the
                 
                paper
                .
               Here are only numbers ratified,

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: but, for the elegancy, facility, and golden cadence of

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: poesy—caret. Ovidius Naso was the man. And why

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: indeed “Naso,” but for smelling out the odoriferous

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: flowers of fancy, the jerks of invention? Imitari is

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: nothing: so doth the hound his master, the ape his

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: keeper, the tired horse his rider.—But damosella

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: virgin, was this directed to you?

speaker: JAQUENETTA
text: Ay, sir, from one Monsieur Berowne, one

speaker: JAQUENETTA
text: of the strange queen’s lords.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text:
I will overglance the superscript: 
                “
                To
                
                the
                 
                snow-white
                 
                hand
                 
                of
                 
                the
                 
                most
                 
                beauteous
                 
                Lady
                
                Rosaline
                .
                ”
                 
              I will look again on the intellect of the

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: letter for the nomination of the party writing to

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text:
the person written unto: 
                “
                Your
                 
                Ladyship’s
                 
                in
                 
                all
                
                desired
                 
                employment
                ,
                 
                Berowne
                .
                ”
               Sir Nathaniel, this

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Berowne is one of the votaries with the King, and

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: here he hath framed a letter to a sequent of the

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: stranger queen’s: which accidentally, or by the way

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: of progression, hath miscarried.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Trip and go, my sweet. Deliver this paper into the

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: royal hand of the King. It may concern much. Stay

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: not thy compliment. I forgive thy duty. Adieu.

speaker: JAQUENETTA
text: Good Costard, go with me.—Sir, God

speaker: JAQUENETTA
text: save your life.

speaker: COSTARD
text: Have with thee, my girl.

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: Sir, you have done this in the fear of God

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: very religiously; and, as a certain Father saith—

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: Sir, tell not me of the Father. I do fear

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: colorable colors. But to return to the verses: did

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: they please you, Sir Nathaniel?

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: Marvelous well for the pen.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: I do dine today at the father’s of a certain

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: pupil of mine, where if, before repast, it shall

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: please you to gratify the table with a grace, I will,

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: on my privilege I have with the parents of the

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: foresaid child or pupil, undertake your ben venuto;

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: where I will prove those verses to be very unlearned,

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: neither savoring of poetry, wit, nor invention.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: I beseech your society.

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: And thank you too; for society, saith the

speaker: NATHANIEL
text: text, is the happiness of life.

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: And certes the text most infallibly concludes

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text:
it.
                 
                To
                 
                Dull
                .
               Sir, I do invite you too. You shall

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: not say me nay. Pauca verba. Away! The gentles are

speaker: HOLOFERNES
text: at their game, and we will to our recreation.
